welcome.title: Welcome back
welcome.streakText: You're on a 5-day streak. Keep the momentum going — your next sub-topic awaits.

inProgressCourses.title: The AI Consumer & Builder
inProgressCourses.description: Master prompt engineering, multimodal creativity, Python for AI, and responsible prompting through 4 intensive weeks.

availableCourses.title: The Data & ML Architect
availableCourses.description: Advanced data wrangling, ensemble ML methods, NLP foundations, time series forecasting, and Kaggle competition readiness.

availableCourses.title: The Gen AI & RAG Specialist
availableCourses.description: LLM architecture, fine-tuning with LoRA/QLoRA, RAG systems with vector databases, diffusion models, and AI agents.

availableCourses.title: The Agentic & Deep Tech Engineer
availableCourses.description: Agentic AI architectures, enterprise AI platforms, industry verticals (healthcare, finance, manufacturing), AI governance, and career readiness.
